text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions are rising, with Red Sea attacks and oil prices spiking on Iran war concerns. This typically spooks tech and growth, as risk-off sentiment can hit your concentrated book hard.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.46%) and SPAL (-50.3%) are leveraged ETFs with significant losses, decaying assets, and need immediate attention given your margin exposure. QQQI (-3.17%) is also flagged for a trim with its stop at 52.

Watch: Keep a close eye on oil prices and any further escalation in the Middle East. Also, monitor your leveraged positions closely for further decay.

Bottom line: Geopolitical risk is the primary concern today; manage your leveraged losses decisively.
plays: SOXL is a SELL and deeply in the red at -35.46%. Consider exiting or significantly reducing this leveraged position immediately.
SPAL is a new, leveraged position down -50.3%. Re-evaluate its role and consider trimming or exiting given its volatility and decay.
QQQI is flagged for a TRIM; respect the stop at 52 to manage further downside.
